Hero.headline: Stories That Make Your Child

AiStorytellingIntro.title: Weekly Generated Stories
AiStorytellingIntro.subtitle: Create personalized adventures where your child is the hero
AiStorytellingIntro.feature1Desc: Each week, new stories featuring your child as the main character
AiStorytellingIntro.feature2Desc: Stories aligned with the skills you want your child to develop
AiStorytellingIntro.feature3Desc: Interactive challenges to reach objectives and build confidence
AiStorytellingIntro.mainDescription: Your child will embark on weekly adventures where they're the hero! Stories are tailored to their interests and designed to help them reach your chosen learning objectives. Watch as they grow in confidence, expand their vocabulary, and develop critical thinking skills—all through the joy of reading.

StoryReadingInterface.missingRequiredParameters: The story ID and child ID are required to load the story.
StoryReadingInterface.storyNotFound: The requested story could not be found. Please verify the story ID and try again.
StoryReadingInterface.unableToStartStory: Unable to start the story for the child. Check the parameters and try again.

readingSettings.title: Reading Settings
readingSettings.readingTipText: Use the audio controls to listen along while reading. This helps improve pronunciation and comprehension!

readingHelp.title: Reading Help
readingHelp.navigationDesc: Use the arrows at the bottom to move between pages. Your progress is saved automatically.
readingHelp.audioReadingDesc: Press play to hear the story read aloud. Adjust language in the controls.
readingHelp.riddlesDesc: When you see a riddle indicator, solve it to continue the story and earn stars!

storyFlowNavigation.riddleTimeText: Once you read this page, click Solve the riddle button to continue the story

riddleInterface.incorrectAnswer: Not quite right, but that's okay! Every try helps you learn. Want to try again or use a hint?
riddleInterface.almostAnswer: Think about it a little more. You can do this!
riddleInterface.solvedAnswerRIDDLE: Fantastic! You solved the riddle! Your reading skills are amazing!
riddleInterface.solvedAnswerTRUE_FALSE: Correct! You understood that statement perfectly!
riddleInterface.solvedAnswerMULTIPLE_CHOICE: Excellent choice! You really understood the story!
riddleInterface.solvedAnswerCHOOSE_ENDING: Excellent choice! Thank you for sharing your perspective!
riddleInterface.solvedAnswerMORAL_DECISION: Excellent choice! Thank you for sharing your perspective!

hintPanel.noMoreHints: No more hints available. You can do this!
hintPanel.allHintsRevealed: All hints revealed. Give it your best try!
